findings.description: Entire page content is duplicated in the HTML rendering.
findings.evidence: The HTML visually presents the page content first in a formatted layout (with images), and then repeats the entire text sequentially in a plain, unformatted block below it.

findings.description: Entire page content is duplicated in the HTML rendering.
findings.evidence: Similar to page 1, the HTML visually presents the page content first in a formatted layout (with the signature image), and then repeats the entire text sequentially in a plain, unformatted block below it.
